# TypeScript Skill Baseline

## Baseline

- Use strict typing defaults for core domain objects.
- Keep types close to domain boundaries (photo, tag, search, AI response).
- Prefer explicit return types for exported functions.

## Patterns

- Define shared contract types for AI provider adapters.
- Normalize external API responses into stable internal types.
- Avoid implicit `any` in data transforms.

## Learning Log

- No task learnings recorded yet.
